name_en: M59273 Beige M58951 Black Speedy Bandoulière 25 Handbag reappears in the 2021 Autumn Wild at Heart capsule collection, featuring a large LV monogram embossed on Monogram Empreinte leather, with a removable shoulder strap adding a crossbody option. Dimensions: 25.0 x 19.0 x 15.0 cm (L x H x W).
